## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

List the checks you ran.

## Public-Safety Review

- [ ] I did not include secrets, private code, customer data, or internal-only links.
- [ ] I sanitized logs, screenshots, and example artifacts.
- [ ] I updated docs for any user-visible behavior change.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and left unrelated cleanup out.

## Reviewer Notes

Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to.
